detectors.description:
Reentrancy in HULKBUSTER.openTrading() (HULKBUSTER.sol#571-597):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (HULKBUSTER.sol#581)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HULKBUSTER.sol#583)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (HULKBUSTER.sol#583)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (HULKBUSTER.sol#593)
	HULKBUSTER.tradingOpen (HULKBUSTER.sol#279) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HULKBUSTER.openTrading() (HULKBUSTER.sol#571-597)

detectors.description:

		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (HULKBUSTER.sol#633)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (HULKBUSTER.sol#635)

	- HULKBUSTER._takeTeam(uint256) (HULKBUSTER.sol#647-655)
	- HULKBUSTER._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (HULKBUSTER.sol#629-643)
	- HULKBUSTER.balanceOf(address) (HULKBUSTER.sol#355-359)
	- HULKBUSTER.constructor() (HULKBUSTER.sol#305-319)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (HULKBUSTER.sol#499)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (HULKBUSTER.sol#661)
	HULKBUSTER._rTotal (HULKBUSTER.sol#253) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- HULKBUSTER._getCurrentSupply() (HULKBUSTER.sol#753-763)
	- HULKBUSTER._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (HULKBUSTER.sol#659-665)
	- HULKBUSTER.constructor() (HULKBUSTER.sol#305-319)
	- HULKBUSTER.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (HULKBUSTER.sol#411-419)
